title: Ten year mark for George parkrun: Come join the magic this Saturday!
description: GEORGE NEWS - Those who love their parkrun...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Those who love their parkrun on Saturday mornings must remember to join the group this coming Saturday 6 April at 08:00, at the Garden Route Botanical Gardens for the George parkrun's 10-year anniversary celebrations.


> "We are looking to get 1 000 participants on that day," said communications officer Wayne Ryder.


Ryder want to see as many participants as possible for this coming parkrun. A commemorative picture will be taken after participating in the 5km run / walk."It's a real special event, so make the effort to get out of bed early and give your body, mind and soul a much-needed rest," said Ryder.


> Everyone will gather at the garden and start at 08:00, as usual.


The first George parkrun was officially opened by nine-time Comrades winner Bruce Fordyce on Saturday 5 April 2014. In South Africa, George was the 29th town to launch a parkrun.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
